menu.title: Sick leave
menu.end.confirm: Close your active sick leave case? HR will be notified.
menu.status.none: You do not have an active sick leave report.
menu.status.active_with_end: Active sick leave since {startDate}, expected return {endDate}. Status: {status}.
dialog.a.title: Report sick leave
dialog.a.intro: Enter the first day you were unable to work due to illness.
dialog.a.start_date_help: Format: MM/DD/YYYY. Cannot be in the future.
dialog.b.title: Update sick leave
dialog.b.intro: Provide your expected return date and whether you have a medical certificate (AU).
dialog.b.expected_end_help: Format: MM/DD/YYYY. Must be on or after your first sick day.
dialog.c.title: Extend sick leave
dialog.c.intro: Enter a new expected return date if your sick leave continues.
dialog.c.expected_end_help: Format: MM/DD/YYYY. Must be after your current expected return date.
